description: Parameter used as a boolean condition in a CASE WHEN expression to toggle which column is returned

columns.name: display
columns.note: Both branches (name, email) are NOT NULL so result is non-null

name: param_in_case_when
query_sql:
-- @name GetUserDisplay
-- @returns :many
SELECT id, CASE WHEN $1 THEN name ELSE email END AS display FROM users
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL);
